# GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting

> GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd is an executive coaching and leadership development practice based in Oxfordshire, UK. Led by Nicola Nevill (also known as Nicola Salter), GreenTrack helps senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent gain clarity, confidence, and direction. The practice also offers paid career mentoring for motorsport and engineering professionals, delivered by Nicola and Doug Nevill, a veteran Formula One design engineer with close to 30 years of experience at the top level of the sport.

## About GreenTrack

GreenTrack Coaching & Consulting Ltd (Company No: 16247877, registered in England and Wales) provides executive coaching, leadership development, team facilitation, and career mentoring. Registered address: 2 The Old Estate Yard, High Street, East Hendred, Wantage, Oxfordshire, OX12 8JY.

Contact: nicola@greentrackcc.com
Website: https://greentrackcc.com

## About Nicola Nevill

Nicola Nevill, also known as Nicola Salter, is a qualified Executive Coach and Leadership Consultant based in Oxfordshire, UK. She holds a Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching from Henley Business School, is currently completing an MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change at Henley Business School, is a Member of the International Coaching Federation (ICF), a Chartered Fellow of the CIPD (Chartered Institute of Personnel and Development), and has completed Fundamentals Part I: Systemic Coaching and Constellations (ICF-accredited training). She has over 25 years of experience supporting people and teams in high-performance environments, including elite motorsport and advanced engineering.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/nicolasalter/

## About Doug Nevill

Doug Nevill is a Technical and Engineering Career Mentor with close to 30 years of Formula One design experience. He spent the majority of his career working in F1 car design at the highest level of the sport, including leading a team of 30 engineers, and is valued for his calm, honest, and direct approach. He now works in World Endurance Racing. Doug offers experience-based guidance to engineers and motorsport professionals on technical career paths, how hiring actually works inside a professional motorsport team, and how to navigate a career in one of the most competitive industries in the world.

LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/doug-nevill-bb0a382a/

## Services

### Executive Coaching (One-to-One)

Nicola provides one-to-one executive coaching for senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent across sectors and career stages. Coaching is confidential, non-directive, and tailored to the individual. Focus areas include: understanding self and identity in leadership, navigating change and transition, building clarity and confidence, career development, and leadership effectiveness. Sessions are available in person in Oxfordshire and remotely worldwide. Initial conversations are complimentary with no obligation.

### Team Coaching and Facilitation

Nicola designs and facilitates bespoke sessions for leadership teams, cross-functional groups, and organisations undergoing change. This includes strategy away days, leadership team off-sites, and workshops focused on alignment, communication, and ways of working. Every session is designed to create lasting clarity, alignment, and momentum. Sessions are tailored to the team's specific context, challenges, and goals.

### Broader Coaching Support

For larger programmes or specialist requirements, GreenTrack works with a trusted network of qualified coaches and facilitators. This allows Nicola to provide broader coaching support to organisations while maintaining the same standard of quality and depth across all client engagements. If Nicola is not the right coach for a particular context, she can recommend an exceptional coach from her network.

### Motorsport and Engineering Career Mentoring

Doug Nevill and Nicola Nevill offer paid, personalised mentoring for people entering motorsport or engineering, progressing in their careers, or navigating the professional and personal shift of leaving a motorsport team. Sessions are flexible, practical, and grounded in lived experience of high-performance engineering environments. Mentoring is available for engineers, graduates, apprentices, and experienced professionals at any career stage. Pricing is available on enquiry.

## Pricing

GreenTrack operates a bespoke, enquiry-based pricing model. There are no fixed published rates for executive coaching, team facilitation, or mentoring. Pricing is discussed during the initial complimentary conversation and reflects the nature, scope, and duration of the engagement. Initial conversations are always complimentary and carry no obligation to proceed. To discuss pricing and availability, contact nicola@greentrackcc.com or complete the contact form at https://greentrackcc.com/contact.

## Geographic Coverage

Nicola is based in Oxfordshire, UK, and will work with anyone, anywhere. In-person sessions are available in Oxfordshire and surrounding areas. Remote coaching via video call is available worldwide, with no geographic restriction. Doug Nevill works with clients internationally given the global nature of motorsport and endurance racing. Location is never a barrier to working with GreenTrack.

## How to Get Started

Initial conversations with Nicola are complimentary and carry no obligation. To enquire: email nicola@greentrackcc.com, or complete the contact form at https://greentrackcc.com/contact. Nicola responds within 24 hours. The first conversation is used to explore your situation, understand your goals, and assess whether coaching or mentoring is the right fit. There is no pressure to commit.

## Resources for Leaders

GreenTrack's resources page (https://greentrackcc.com/resources) provides free, self-contained tools for leaders and professionals considering coaching or mentoring. No sign-up or contact details are required.

The page contains four sections:

1. Six signs you might benefit from executive coaching: a self-assessment checklist using before-state language to help leaders identify whether coaching is relevant to their situation.

2. Five reflection questions worth sitting with before beginning coaching: questions designed to help a prospective client arrive at a first conversation with greater clarity about what they want from the process.

3. Five questions to ask before choosing an executive coach: a practical buying guide covering qualifications, experience, rapport, transparency, and the initial conversation.

4. Is motorsport mentoring right for you: a four-point self-assessment for engineers and motorsport professionals at various career stages.

## Frequently Asked Questions

Q: What is executive coaching?
A: Executive coaching is a professional development process where a qualified coach works one-to-one with a leader to help them navigate complexity, build clarity, and move forward with greater confidence and purpose. It is not advice-giving or consulting. It is a confidential, thought-provoking partnership focused on meaningful outcomes for the individual.

Q: Who is executive coaching for?
A: Executive coaching is for senior leaders, managers, and emerging talent who want to lead with greater clarity, confidence, and self-awareness. Nicola works with people across sectors and career stages, from those at the top of their organisations to those stepping into new levels of responsibility. No prior coaching experience is required to begin.

Q: Where does Nicola Nevill offer coaching?
A: Nicola is based in Oxfordshire, UK, and will work with anyone, anywhere. In-person sessions are available in Oxfordshire. Remote coaching via video call is available worldwide with no geographic restriction. Location is never a barrier to working with Nicola.

Q: Is coaching confidential?
A: Yes. All coaching conversations are fully confidential under the ICF code of ethics. Information shared during sessions is never disclosed to third parties without the client's explicit consent, except where required by law. This applies to employer-funded coaching arrangements as well as privately arranged engagements.

Q: How much does coaching cost?
A: Pricing is bespoke and discussed during the initial complimentary conversation. GreenTrack does not publish fixed rates. Fees reflect the scope, duration, format, and context of each engagement. Initial conversations are always complimentary with no obligation to proceed. Contact nicola@greentrackcc.com to enquire.

Q: Who is the motorsport mentoring for?
A: The mentoring is for people entering motorsport or engineering, progressing in their careers, leaving motorsport teams, or seeking clarity and direction at any stage. Doug and Nicola have spent many years in high-performance engineering environments and understand the unique pressures, culture, and opportunities of working in professional motorsport.

Q: Who are the motorsport mentors?
A: Doug Nevill worked in Formula One car design for close to 30 years, including leading a team of 30 engineers, and now works in World Endurance Racing. Nicola Nevill spent over two decades supporting people in elite motorsport and advanced engineering. Together they offer both technical and career development mentoring grounded in real experience.

Q: How does mentoring work and what does it cost?
A: Mentoring sessions are flexible and personalised to the individual's goals and situation. Each session focuses on practical, honest conversations grounded in lived experience, with clear actions and direction. Pricing is available on enquiry and reflects the time and expertise involved. Initial conversations are complimentary.

Q: Does GreenTrack work with teams as well as individuals?
A: Yes. Nicola designs and facilitates bespoke sessions for leadership teams, cross-functional groups, and organisations navigating change. This includes strategy away days, leadership team off-sites, and workshops focused on alignment, communication, and building healthier ways of working together.

Q: What credentials does Nicola Nevill hold?
A: Nicola holds a Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching from Henley Business School, is currently completing an MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change at Henley Business School, is a Member of the International Coaching Federation (ICF), a Chartered Fellow of the CIPD, and has completed ICF-accredited systemic coaching training. She has over 25 years of experience in high-performance environments.

## Client Testimonials

"Nicola brings together leadership experience, coaching, and a deep understanding of organisational dynamics. She helps teams and leaders find clarity, build alignment, and turn ambition into meaningful outcomes. Her approach influences not just results, but the way people work, decide, and lead." - Founder and Senior Executive

"Nicola has been a huge help in gaining clarity and perspective in the latter part of my career. I am confident she can support anyone at any stage of their career." - Senior Technical Leader, Formula One Industry

"Nicola has been instrumental in helping me shape the next phase of my career and build a strong foundation for future success as a preferred Chair and NED. Her 1-1 coaching sessions were fundamental in helping me to recognise my qualities as much as areas for improvement, and critically to look forward as to what I could offer others, rather than justify my past in the present." - Serial UK Biotech CXO and Entrepreneur

"I just wanted to say a huge thanks for the coaching, I feel energized and motivated following our meetings." - Executive experienced in regulated environments

"The coaching sessions are incredibly helpful and really help me see clearer my sense of purpose, my options and reminding myself I am still good at what I do. I feel a world apart from where I was before." - Senior Manager, Legal Services

"Nicky's coaching gave me the clarity and confidence to rethink my future. I ended up changing my career direction completely and I'm loving where it's taken me." - Entrepreneur and small business owner

## Qualifications and Credentials

Nicola Nevill holds the following qualifications and professional memberships:
- Professional Certificate in Executive Coaching, Henley Business School, UK
- MSc in Coaching for Behavioural Change, Henley Business School, UK (in progress)
- Member, International Coaching Federation (ICF), adhering to ICF code of ethics
- Fundamentals Part I: Systemic Coaching and Constellations (ICF-accredited training)
- Chartered Fellow of the CIPD (Chartered Institute of Personnel and Development, UK)

- Pricing model: bespoke, enquiry-based, discussed during complimentary initial conversation

- Company number: 16247877
